api_token.description: ClickUp personal API token, sent raw (no Bearer prefix) in the Authorization header. Never logged.

base_url.description: ClickUp API base URL override for tests or proxies.

team_id.description: ClickUp team (workspace) id. Required for the 'spaces' and 'tasks' streams.

space_id.description: ClickUp space id. Required for the 'folders' and 'lists' streams.

include_archived.description: When 'true', include archived spaces/folders/lists/tasks (sent as archived=true instead of the default archived=false).

include_closed_tasks.description: When 'true', include closed tasks in the 'tasks' stream (sent as include_closed=true).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
